recommendedGmailBatch.bestOffer: Storm/roof-repair landing page for SEO or paid ads

manualHighPriorityQueue.bestOffer: Broken-link fix plus first mobile shop page
Domain repair/replacement landing page with mobile call and hours
Domain/site repair plus mobile HVAC landing page

mockupOutreachUseOnlyWhen: business has no website linked from Google Business Profile / Google Maps
website is visibly outdated, broken, low-trust, or Google/Yext/GBP-style placeholder
mockup is clearly stronger than the existing site within 5 seconds on mobile
there is a specific page-level gap such as no service page, no landing page, poor mobile CTA, or broken request flow
doNotUseMockupOutreachWhen: existing website is already more polished than the mockup
existing website has solid branding, navigation, service structure, testimonials/gallery/contact paths
our advantage is only generic aesthetics rather than a concrete conversion or campaign angle
alternateAnglesForStrongSites: Google Ads / landing page campaign for one high-value service
seasonal offer page tied to paid ads
commercial/video ad package that points to their existing site or a campaign page
SEO/local service page expansion rather than homepage redesign

pausedStrongSiteProspects.gmbSignal: Google Maps limited view showed 4.8 stars
pausedStrongSiteProspects.subject: quick mockup for M&P Plumbing
pausedStrongSiteProspects.reasonPaused: Stark reviewed official site and judged it stronger than our current mockup; generic redesign/mockup pitch would weaken SYBEORG positioning.
pausedStrongSiteProspects.recommendedNextApproach: Only pursue with a precise conversion audit, paid-ads landing page, or video/campaign angle after we can show a concrete improvement over their current site.
pausedStrongSiteProspects.primaryPain: Website is already strong, so generic redesign is not the play.
pausedStrongSiteProspects.bestOffer: Conversion audit, paid-ads landing page, or high-value service campaign
pausedStrongSiteProspects.upsell: Video ads/commercial shoot, remarketing creatives, and SEO/service-page expansion.

gapBasedOfferPolicy.primaryPain: The concrete business gap we can point to without insulting them.
gapBasedOfferPolicy.bestOffer: The first thing SYBEORG should sell for that gap.
gapBasedOfferPolicy.upsell: The next logical service if the first gap is solved or already covered.
rules: No logo or weak identity -> logo/brand refresh.
Needs more walk-ins, calls, or foot traffic -> local SEO, Google Business Profile cleanup, and/or paid ads.
Weak SEO or thin service-area visibility -> SEO/service pages.
No/broken/placeholder site -> website, repair, or focused landing page.
If web/SEO/brand basics are already solid -> video ads, short-form creatives, commercial shoots, remarketing assets, or campaign pages.
